basic_details.job_title: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026-27: The National Skill Training Institute (NSTI), Kanpur, under the Directorate General of Training (DGT), Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship, has released the notification for recruitment to the post of Guest Faculty (CITS/CTS Trades). Interested and eligible candidates can apply through offline mode (By Post or By Hand) for engagement as Guest Faculty in various trades/subjects under CITS and CTS schemes.

important_dates.written & skill test date: Not yet released - tentative date to be published on the institute website and sent via email

age_limit.details: The minimum age for all trades is 21 years as on 01 August 2026. No upper age limit is specified in the notification.

qualification.details: Note: For all routes above, candidates must hold CITS (Craft Instructor Training Scheme) qualification unless applying under the Ex-serviceman equivalency route, which requires 15 years of service in the related field with a minimum 2-year methods-of-instruction course from a technical training institute of the Indian Armed Forces.

vacancy_details.details: The notification does not mention a fixed number of vacancies. It clearly states that the number of vacancies may increase or decrease as per requirement. Guest Faculty engagement is invited under two schemes covering the following trades/subjects: Turner Machinist Fitter Electronics Mechanic Electrician Sewing Technology Dress Making COPA/CHNM (CHNM) CSA MMV (Mechanic Motor Vehicle) Welder Information Technology Training Methodology Workshop Calculation and Science Solar Technician (Electrical) Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Technician

salary_details.maximum monthly ceiling: Rs. 30,000 per Guest Faculty per calendar month

selection_process: Selection will be made on the basis of a Written Test and a Skill Test. The tentative examination date will be published on the institute website and communicated via email. Call letters for the examination will be sent through email to eligible candidates only. The written and skill test for all trades/subjects will be conducted at the same time
so applicants are advised to apply for only one post.
how_to_apply: Download the application form from the official website: http://nstikanpur.dgt.gov.in
Fill the form in capital letters with all required personal, educational, and experience details.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all certificates, mark sheets, and experience proof.
Affix one self-attested passport-size color photograph on the form and enclose 2 additional photographs.
Write "Application for Guest Faculty in ......... (CTS/CITS) trade/subject" clearly on top of the envelope.
Send the completed application by post or submit by hand to: The Deputy Director/Training Incharge, National Skill Training Institute (NSTI), P.O-Udyog Nagar, Kanpur-208022
Ensure the application reaches on or before 03 August 2026, up to 5:30 PM (Monday to Friday).
important_instructions: Engagement of Guest Faculty is purely temporary and can be cancelled at any time without providing any reason by the engaging authority (RD/HOD). Engagement is renewed periodically every three months. Applicants are advised to apply for only one post, as the written and skill test for all trades/subjects will be held at the same time. The Regional Director, NSTI Kanpur, reserves the right to cancel or alter any recruitment without assigning any reason. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease as per requirement.

content_sections.heading: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Notification 2026 PDF Out
content_sections.text: The National Skill Training Institute (NSTI), Kanpur, under the Directorate General of Training (DGT), Ministry of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship, has released a notification inviting offline applications for the engagement of Guest Faculties for the session 2026-27. Notification PDF: Download NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Notification 2026-27 PDF Official Website: Check Here

content_sections.heading: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026-27 - Quick Overview
NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026-27 Important Dates

rows.date: 03 August 2026, up to 5:30 PM (Monday to Friday)
Not yet released - tentative date to be published on the institute website and sent via email

content_sections.heading: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026-27 Details
content_sections.text: The notification does not mention a fixed number of vacancies. It clearly states that the number of vacancies may increase or decrease as per requirement. Guest Faculty engagement is invited under two schemes covering the following trades/subjects: Turner Machinist Fitter Electronics Mechanic Electrician Sewing Technology Dress Making COPA/CHNM (CHNM) CSA MMV (Mechanic Motor Vehicle) Welder Information Technology Training Methodology Workshop Calculation and Science Solar Technician (Electrical) Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Technician

content_sections.heading: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026-27 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eligibility for NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty posts is trade-specific. Broadly, each trade accepts candidates through one of four routes: a relevant Degree/B.Voc with CITS and post-CITS experience, a relevant Diploma with CITS and post-CITS experience, an Ex-serviceman equivalency route through DGR, or an NTC/NAC qualification with CITS and longer post-CITS experience. Minimum age for all trades is 21 years as on 01 August 2026.

content_sections.heading: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Educational Qualification (Trade-Wise)
content_sections.text: Note: For all routes above, candidates must hold CITS (Craft Instructor Training Scheme) qualification unless applying under the Ex-serviceman equivalency route, which requires 15 years of service in the related field with a minimum 2-year methods-of-instruction course from a technical training institute of the Indian Armed Forces.

rows.qualification_summary: Degree/03-yr Diploma in Mechanical Engineering with CITS + 02/05 years post-CITS experience; OR Ex-serviceman (15 yrs service) with DGR equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with CITS + 07 years post-CITS experience
Degree/03-yr Diploma in Mechanical/Production Engineering with CITS + 02/05 years post-CITS experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with CITS + 07 years experience
Degree/03-yr Diploma in Electronics Engineering with CITS + 02/05 years post-CITS experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with CITS + 07 years experience
Degree/03-yr Diploma in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering with CITS + 02/05 years post-CITS experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with CITS + 07 years experience

Degree/Diploma (min. 2 years) in Costume Designing & Dress Making/Fashion Designing/Fashion Technology/Apparel Technology/Garment Fabrication Technology with CITS + 02/05 years post-CITS experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with CITS + 07 years experience
Degree in Computer Science/IT/Electronics Engineering or NIELIT "B" with CITS + 02/05 years post-CITS experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with CITS + 07 years experience

Degree/PG in Computer Science/IT or NIELIT "B" with CITS + 02 years experience; OR 03-yr Diploma/PGDCA with CITS + 05 years experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with CITS + 07 years experience

Degree in Automobile/Mechanical Engineering with CITS + 02 years experience; OR 03-yr Diploma with 05 years post-CITS experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with 07 years experience. Valid MCWG & LMV driving license mandatory for all candidates.

Degree in Mechanical/Production Engineering with CITS + 02 years experience; OR 05-yr Diploma in Mechanical/Production/Metallurgy/Mechatronics with 2 years post-CITS experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency; OR NTC/NAC with 07 years experience

Degree in Computer Science/IT with CITS + 02 years experience; OR Bachelor's/PGDCA/NIELIT "A" Level with 05 years experience; OR Ex-serviceman equivalency with 05 years post-CITS experience; OR 03-yr Diploma/Advanced Diploma with 05 years experience; OR NTC/NAC with 07 years experience
Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering with CITS + 01 year post-CITS experience; OR 03-yr Diploma with CITS + 02 years experience; OR NTC/NAC with CITS + 03 years experience
Degree in Mechanical Engineering with CITS + 01 year post-CITS experience; OR 03-yr Diploma with 02 years post-CITS experience; OR NTC/NAC with 03 years post-CITS experience
Degree in any discipline with CITS + 02 years experience; OR Diploma in any discipline with CITS + 05 years experience; OR NTC/NAC in any trade with CITS + 07 years experience
Degree in any Engineering with CITS + 02 years experience; OR 03-yr Diploma in any Engineering with CITS + 05 years experience; OR NTC/NAC in any Engineering trade with CITS + 07 years experience

content_sections.heading: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Age Limit 2026-27
content_sections.text: The minimum age for all trades is 21 years as on 01 August 2026. No upper age limit is specified in the notification.

rows.remuneration: Rs. 30,000 per Guest Faculty per calendar month

content_sections.heading: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026-27 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made on the basis of a Written Test and a Skill Test. The tentative examination date will be published on the institute website and communicated via email. Call letters for the examination will be sent through email to eligible candidates only. The written and skill test for all trades/subjects will be conducted at the same time, so applicants are advised to apply for only one post.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Application
content_sections.text: Duly filled application form (in capital letters) Self-attested photocopies of all certificates and mark sheets (10th, 10+2, and technical/professional qualification) Self-attested photocopies of experience certificates 2 recent passport-size color photographs (in addition to the one affixed on the form) Valid MCWG & LMV driving license (mandatory only for MMV trade applicants)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026-27?
content_sections.text: Download the application form from the official website: http://nstikanpur.dgt.gov.in Fill the form in capital letters with all required personal, educational, and experience details. Attach self-attested photocopies of all certificates, mark sheets, and experience proof. Affix one self-attested passport-size color photograph on the form and enclose 2 additional photographs. Write "Application for Guest Faculty in ......... (CTS/CITS) trade/subject" clearly on top of the envelope. Send the completed application by post or submit by hand to: The Deputy Director/Training Incharge, National Skill Training Institute (NSTI), P.O-Udyog Nagar, Kanpur-208022 Ensure the application reaches on or before 03 August 2026, up to 5:30 PM (Monday to Friday).

content_sections.heading: NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026-27 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Engagement of Guest Faculty is purely temporary and can be cancelled at any time without providing any reason by the engaging authority (RD/HOD). Engagement is renewed periodically every three months. Applicants are advised to apply for only one post, as the written and skill test for all trades/subjects will be held at the same time. The Regional Director, NSTI Kanpur, reserves the right to cancel or alter any recruitment without assigning any reason. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease as per requirement.

content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF : Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel : Click Here Sarkari Result : Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here Candidates who hold a Diploma or Degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or Electronics Engineering can also explore more Diploma Government Jobs and Engineering Jobs suited to their qualification. faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application by post or by hand is 03 August 2026, up to 5:30 PM (Monday to Friday).

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary of NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: CITS Guest Faculty are paid Rs. 250 per hour and CTS Guest Faculty are paid Rs. 200 per hour, with a maximum monthly ceiling of Rs. 30,000.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age required for NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: The minimum age required is 21 years as on 01 August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. The engagement is purely temporary, renewed periodically every three months, and can be cancelled at any time without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are there for NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty 2026-27?
faq.answer: Not specified in the notification. It states the number of vacancies may increase or decrease as per requirement.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline - by post or by hand only. There is no online application process mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a Written Test and a Skill Test, with the exam date to be announced on the official website and through email.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply for more than one trade in NSTI Kanpur Guest Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: Applicants are advised to apply for only one post, since the written and skill tests for all trades/subjects will be conducted at the same time.
